note: Evaluation set for the SOLANGE Copilot. Three tasks, each machine-scorable. Values in 'expect_any' are accepted if the model's answer contains any listed string (case-insensitive). 'trap' items have NO answer in the context and should be refused.

extraction.description: Mode A — extract exact fields from the sample provenance record. Ground truth = data/sample_run.json (the answer key).

fields.name: mutation_id
fields.question: What is the mutation_id of this run?

fields.name: jw_qubits
fields.question: How many qubits are in the Jordan-Wigner Hamiltonian?

fields.name: e_casscf
fields.question: What is the CASSCF energy in Hartree?

grounding.description: Mode B / chat — questions answerable from the corpus. Score = expected fact present.

items.question: What drug indirectly targets KEAP1-mutant NSCLC by inhibiting NRF2?
What is the objective response rate to PD-1 blockade in KRAS/STK11-mutant lung cancer?
How does STK11 loss suppress antitumor immunity metabolically?
How did KRAS G12C become druggable?

mutation_probes.description: Per-mutation Druggability (Mode B) evaluation. For a given mutation each 'fact' is a group of accepted strings; the fact counts as covered if the model's answer contains any of them. Facts_covered = fraction of fact-groups present. Also checks whether the answer cites sources like [1].

traps.description: Out-of-context questions with NO answer in the corpus. A well-grounded model should refuse rather than hallucinate. Score = refusal detected.

items.question: What is the FDA-approved dose of osimertinib for TP53 C275F patients?
What was the price of the SOLANGE platform subscription in 2027?
Which soccer team does the KEAP1 gene support?
